target: WIN-067 citation fix: DOI 10.1029/2019JB018855 resolves to wrong paper
author: analyst
finding: DOI 10.1029/2019JB018855 resolves to Castellanos, Clayton & Juarez (2020) "Using a Time-Based Subarray Method to Extract and Invert Noise-Derived Body Waves at Long Beach, California" — a seismic noise paper with no connection to Antarctic gravity. The correct paper is Pappa, Ebbing, Ferraccioli & van der Wal (2019) "Modeling Satellite Gravity Gradient Data to Derive Density, Temperature, and Viscosity Structure of the Antarctic Lithosphere", JGR Solid Earth 124(11), DOI: 10.1029/2019JB017997. This paper models Antarctic lithospheric structure from satellite gravity gradients, discusses mantle thermal structure and East-West Antarctic contrasts — directly relevant to the Antarctic gravity anomaly context. Citation also needs: author correction (Ebbing is second author, not first) and year correction (2019 not 2021). The AGU DOI submission-year encoding hypothesis from ISS-683 is irrelevant — the DOI simply points to a different paper entirely.

wrong_doi.resolves_to: Castellanos, Clayton & Juarez (2020) "Using a Time-Based Subarray Method to Extract and Invert Noise-Derived Body Waves at Long Beach, California", JGR Solid Earth 125(5)
wrong_doi.relevance: None — seismic noise cross-correlation in California, no connection to Antarctic gravity

correct_doi.resolves_to: Pappa, Ebbing, Ferraccioli & van der Wal (2019) "Modeling Satellite Gravity Gradient Data to Derive Density, Temperature, and Viscosity Structure of the Antarctic Lithosphere", JGR Solid Earth 124(11)
correct_doi.relevance: Direct — models Antarctic lithosphere density and mantle thermal structure from satellite gravity data

kernel_of_truth: The Ebbing group does have significant Antarctic gravity/mantle research. Ebbing is co-author on this paper (second author). The DOI was likely a transcription error (018855 vs 017997) — both are 2019JB-series AGU articles.
holes_addressed: ISS-683: Wrong DOI in WIN-067 citation
new_evidence_added: CrossRef API verification of both DOIs
Correct author list: Pappa, Ebbing, Ferraccioli, van der Wal

anticipated_objections.objection: Maybe there is a separate 2021 Ebbing JGR paper we should cite instead
anticipated_objections.response: Searched CrossRef and Google Scholar for Ebbing 2021 JGR East Antarctic. The only 2021 Ebbing Antarctic publication is Pappa & Ebbing in Geological Society London Memoirs (10.1144/m56-2020-5), not JGR. The 2019 JGR paper by Pappa et al. is the correct reference for satellite gravity constraints on Antarctic lithospheric structure.

decider_integration_note: Simple find-and-replace in WIN-067 detail_evidence: replace DOI and author/year citation. Both replacements are unique strings in wins.json. ISS-683 can be closed after integration.
